chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 6260 of 2024 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge(s) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders as to maintainability. 10.02.2025 Mr. Muhammad Shahid Habib, advocate for the petitioner. On the last date, following order was passed: “16.12.2024 Mr. Muhammad Shahid Habib, advocate for the petitioner. 1. Urgency granted. 2. Exemption granted subject to all just exceptions. 3&4. Per learned counsel, a complaint is made to the Grievance Committee pursuant to SPPR Rules. Counsel demonstrates from the page 189 of the court file that notice was issued asking for him to appear, however, he failed to appear there before. Counsel is confronted as to maintainability of the petition. Adjourned.” Today while the learned counsel is unable to satisfy the aforesaid, it is also noted that the petitioner is not a legal entity. In view hereof, petition being misconceived is dismissed. Judge ` Judge Khuhro/PA
